title: IntegrationHub vs RESTMessageV2
question: When would you use IntegrationHub instead of RESTMessageV2?
summary: Explains low-code and scripted integration choices.
exactAnswer: IntegrationHub is preferred when you want reusable, low-code actions and spoke-based integrations that business or platform teams can orchestrate in Flow Designer. RESTMessageV2 is better when you need scripted control, dynamic request composition, custom authentication handling, or server-side integration logic outside a flow context.
keyPoints: IntegrationHub aligns well with Flow Designer and reusable actions.
RESTMessageV2 is a scripting-first API for outbound REST calls.
Choose based on maintainability, reuse, and the complexity of the integration behavior.
examples: Use a spoke action in a flow that creates an external ticket.
Use RESTMessageV2 inside a Script Include that needs full script control.
